scene_title: Anjo mensageiro sobre ilha de Patmos
narrative_beat: Anjo de asas douradas com papiro luminoso

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid golden-winged messenger angel hovering above island carrying luminous papyrus scroll in message-delivery pose in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden wings and luminous papyrus scroll being delivered
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated ancient cartographic map of small Mediterranean island surrounded by sea in background

mood.emotion: the message that crossed two thousand years

symbolism.primary: the angel as courier of the most accurate prediction in history
symbolism.secondary: papyrus scroll as compressed data sent across millennia

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
